Functions and definitions for boot management, firmware storage, system reset, and RTC registers.


## Files
- **[bootbits.c](bootbits.c.md)**: Functions for managing boot bits and bootloader version in the Pebble firmware.
- **[bootbits.h](bootbits.h.md)**: Defines boot bit values and functions for managing boot state in the Pebble firmware.
- **[firmware_storage.c](firmware_storage.c.md)**: Functions for reading and validating firmware descriptions from flash memory.
- **[firmware_storage.h](firmware_storage.h.md)**: Utilities for reading and validating firmware images stored in flash memory.
- **[reset.c](reset.c.md)**: Functions for performing a system reset and a hard reset on the STM32F2 microcontroller.
- **[reset.h](reset.h.md)**: Functions for performing system reset and hard reset operations.
- **[rtc_registers.h](rtc_registers.h.md)**: Defines RTC backup register mappings for boot and system state information.
